Crop P2O5 demand

Source: R/calc_crop_P_K_demand.R
calc_crop_P_demand.Rd

Returns the crop P2O5 requirement (kg/ha) from uptake_table (column P2O5) multiplied by the expected yield.

calc_crop_P_demand(
  expected_yield_tons_ha,
  crop,
  uptake_table = NFert::uptake_table
)

Arguments

expected_yield_tons_ha

Expected yield (t/ha).

crop

Crop name (must match uptake_table$crop).

uptake_table

Lookup table (default NFert::uptake_table).

Value

A list: P2O5_requirement (kg/ha), unit_coef (kg P2O5 / t yield), crop.

Examples

calc_crop_P_demand(expected_yield_tons_ha = 6,
                   crop = "Grano duro (pianta intera)")
#> $P2O5_requirement
#> [1] 63.6
#> 
#> $unit_coef
#> [1] 1.06
#> 
#> $crop
#> [1] "Durum wheat (whole plant)"
#> 
#> $units
#> [1] "kg P2O5/ha"
#>

Contents
